title: Google ADK Translation, Runner, Sessions, Tools, Callbacks, and Confirmation · Program Forensics
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in auditable Google ADK adapter and conformance suite and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Map product policy, provider port, loop, tool registry, session, memory, approval, events, evals, and telemetry to ADK concepts and identify gaps.
Configure Agent, model, instruction, tools, Runner, invocation, events, and async lifecycle with explicit versions and bounded behavior.
Select and test ADK session and memory services for identity, persistence, isolation, migration, retention, and replay boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Adk Confirmation Conformance
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-adk-confirmation-conformance-74u46e" that uses case 5762 to map the verified custom core into ADK agent, runner, tools, sessions, callbacks, plugins, confirmation, evaluation, and deployment boundaries. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Adk Confirmation Conformance.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Adk Confirmation Conformance into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Adk Confirmation Conformance, keep Adk Confirmation Conformance connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-adk-confirmation-conformance-74u46e
# Competency: agentpy-adk-confirmation-conformance.
# Case 5762: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_adk_confirmation_conformance_74u46e(core_contracts: int = 10, mapped_contracts: int = 10, framework_callbacks: int = 5, confirmation_paths: int = 3, hidden_framework_effects: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_74u46e = "74u46e-e64u47-5762"
    assert evidence_variant_74u46e
    evidence_axes_74u46e = (
        "authority74u46e",
        "interaction5762",
        "toole64u47",
        "state74u46e5762",
        "evaluation576274u46e",
        "recoverye64u475762",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_74u46e)) == 6
    if core_contracts < 6 or mapped_contracts < 0:
        return False, mapped_contracts, "framework-contract-count"
    if mapped_contracts != core_contracts:
        return False, mapped_contracts, "framework-mapping-gap"
    if framework_callbacks < 3 or confirmation_paths < 2:
        return False, framework_callbacks, "framework-control-gap"
    if hidden_framework_effects > 0:
        return False, hidden_framework_effects, "framework-hidden-effect"
    assert mapped_contracts == core_contracts and hidden_framework_effects == 0
    return True, mapped_contracts, "auditable-adk-translation"
